name: SEO Blog Posts — Exa Keyword Research + Claude Writing + Sheets Tracking
description: Uses Exa for keyword research and competitive analysis, Claude AI to write SEO-optimized blog posts with proper headings and meta tags, and saves the results to Google Sheets for content tracking.

source.originalName: Auto-generate SEO blog posts with Perplexity, GPT, Leonardo & WordPress

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for keyword research

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving posts

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for post notifications

spreadsheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL to save generated posts (columns: Date, Keyword, Title, MetaDescription, WordCount, Status)

keyword.description: Target SEO keyword or topic (e.g. 'best project management tools 2025')

targetWordCount.description: Target word count for the blog post

steps.name: Research keyword with Exa for competitive analysis
Parse Exa research results for SEO context
Build Claude SEO blog post prompt
Run Claude AI to write SEO blog post
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Save SEO post data to Google Sheets
Build Slack Block Kit SEO post summary
